question: Which university did the author of The Hobbit teach at?

context.title: J. R. R. Tolkien
context.text: J. R. R. Tolkien wrote The Hobbit and was a professor at Oxford University.

context.title: Oxford University
context.text: Oxford University is a collegiate research university in Oxford, England.

question: What river flows through the city where Ada Lovelace was born?

context.title: Ada Lovelace
context.text: Ada Lovelace was born in London, England.
